title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 533.120 - Judgment rendered against plaintiff and his sureties, when
text:
533.120.  Judgment rendered against plaintiff and his sureties, when. — In such case, the judgment shall be against the plaintiff and his sureties, that he return the property taken, or pay the value so assessed, at the election of the defendant, and, also, pay the damages assessed for the taking and detention of the property and costs of suit.
(RSMo 1939 § 1799) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1635; 1919 § 2083; 1909 § 2648
